title: Blender CLI Improvements
description: Add CLI commands that would accelerate geometry node development: export command to trigger node export from CLI, open command to load a specific .blend file, diff command to compare two node group outputs, list-groups command to enumerate registered node groups, and inspect command to show node group structure. Also fix the fallback reload path in blender_server.py to properly call register() after module reloads.
definition-of-done: 1. blender-cli export --group <name> triggers the node exporter with CLI flags for options. 2. blender-cli open <path> loads a .blend file in the running Blender instance. 3. blender-cli list-groups shows all registered geo_node_groups. 4. blender-cli inspect --group <name> shows node count, links, interface, frame structure. 5. blender-cli diff --group <name> --before <file> compares mesh metrics. 6. Fallback reload path calls register() to ensure proper decorator re-registration.
testing-plan: Test each new command against existing node groups and .blend files. Verify reload fallback properly populates all registries.
todos: DONE : Add open command handler to blender_server.py (bpy.ops.wm.open_mainfile)
DONE : Add export command handler to blender_server.py
DONE : Fix fallback reload to call register() after module reloads
DONE : Add CLI subcommands to blender_cli for each new handler
unknowns-resolved: Diff compares mesh metrics (vertex/edge/face count) with optional save/compare against JSON baseline.
Export options are exposed as CLI flags with sensible defaults (--use-helpers on, --split-frames off, --include-labels on, --include-locations off, --include-names off).
Open command replaces the scene (uses bpy.ops.wm.open_mainfile) and re-registers the command queue timer.
changes-made: Added handle_open_file, handle_list_groups, handle_inspect_group, handle_export_group, handle_diff_group to blender_server.py
Created tools/commands/node_tools.py with @cli_command decorated functions: open, list_groups, inspect, export, diff
Fixed fallback reload path to call register() after module reloads
Fixed open_mainfile handler to re-register _process_command_queue timer
Fixed cli_registry.py _normalize_annotation to handle string annotations from 'from __future__ import annotations'
Fixed handle_diff_group to pass 'group_name' (not 'group') to handle_apply_node_group
